column14: Extremely slight improvement due to high score usually being found fast enough without warm start
No improvements due to bounding rule 2 never triggering.
No improvement due to rule 2 still not being aggresive enough.
Bounding rule 3 also does not fire.
Rule 4 does a magnificent job of pruning branches early, leading to a faster finish even with almost a third slower nodes per second processing speed.
Rule 2 update has still not made it fire once.
An incredible optimization. Now to check whether the results are much more unoptimal or not.

Another breakthrough! Turns out that testing a bunch of randomly generated boxes leads you to the understanding that having a bunch of the same box dimension leads to combinatorial explosions and deduplication / symmetry breakage must occur for computation timeframes to be reasonable, optimality guarantee or not.
No code changes, but performance benchmarks from here on out will be done on test order 25 (25 boxes) from this point on due to achieving trivialization of test order 15.
Very small optimization. Should consider more.
